item.title: PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious mea...
item.description:
View on Instagram


PASTA AL GRANCHIO 🦀One of the most surprisingly delicious meals I’ve ever madeIngredients-Dungess Crab -Salmon Roe (optional)-Shallot-Garlic-Lemon-Parsley-Basil-Calabrian chili or chili flakes -Butter-Dry white wine-Bucatini, spaghetti, or linguini-Burrata (optional)RECIPE-Break down your crab: cutting off the sharp tips of the leps, removing the belly flap, separating the body and the top shell -Scrape out and save the tomalley (“crab mustard” -Discard mandibles and gills, remove claws -Crack the claw pieces -Boil the crab for approximately 7 minutes -Remove the crab from water, let cool -Crack open the shell and remove the crab meat, set aside-Mince shallot, garlic, and parsley-Sauté ingredients in extra virgin olive oil until translucent-Add Calabrian chili or red pepper flakes (optional) with butter-Add dry white wine, cook it down-Cook your pasta-Add al dente pasta, cooked crab, lemon juice + zest-Emulsify the ingredients with reserved pasta waterPlate and serve! Add burrata and salmon roe for extra depth #food #cibo #italian #fusion #pasta #burrata #salmon

item.title: Dark Chocolate and Raspberry Soufflé inspired by @tresemme ‘s...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Dark Chocolate and Raspberry Soufflé inspired by @tresemme ‘s Total Volume Mousse #TRESPartner

item.title: Historically, all of my moves while living in Los Angeles have b...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Historically, all of my moves while living in Los Angeles have been extremely stressful, but this year I used @roadwaymoving and it was the smoothest moving process I could’ve asked for. In a mind-blowing feat, they packed and moved my entire apartment in a few hours. So excited to get to work in my new space! #moving #losangeles

item.title: MA!?! Tacos de Carne Asada 🌮IngredientsFor the Carne Asada-1 ...
item.description:
View on Instagram


MA!?! Tacos de Carne Asada 🌮IngredientsFor the Carne Asada-1 lb Skirt, Flank, or Flap Steak-3 tbs Extra Virgin Olive Oil-Juice of 1 lime -Juice of 1 orange-Minced garlic -Spices : paprika, cumin, adobo, salt, pepperFor the Repollo (purple cabbage slaw)-Finely cut/shredded purple or green cabbage-2 to 3 tbs fresh lime juice-1 tbs olive oil-Pinch of salt-Chopped cilantro (add to preference) For the guacamole-2 to 3 ripe avocados -Juice of fresh lime-1/4 c finely diced red onion-Chopped cilantro -Salt and pepper to taste-Add ins: roma tomato, jalapeño (We didn’t have it at the time)For the pickled red onions-1 red onion-1 c vinegar (white or apple cider vinegar)-1/2 c water-1 tbs sugar-1 teaspoon salt-Optional add-ins: garlic clove, bay leaf, peppercornsFor taco assembly-Corn tortillas-Cotija cheese-Pickled jalapeños #cooking #tacos #grilling #carneasada

item.title: One of my favorite breakfasts this time of year — Chocolate Pe...
item.description:
View on Instagram


One of my favorite breakfasts this time of year — Chocolate Peppermint Protein Pancakes using @kachava ‘s all-in-one nutrition superfood blend. Ingredients-2 scoops of Chocolate Ka’Chava -1/4 c almond flour-1/2 tsp baking powder-1/4 tsp baking soda1/4 tsp cinnamon -1 large egg-1/4 c milk-1/2 tsp vanilla extract-1/2 tsp peppermint extract-Butter or coconut oil for greasing the griddle Toppings -Peppermint (optional)-Strawberries or other fruit of choice!-Maple syrup #pancakes #KachavaPartner

item.title: BEEF WELLINGTON 🔪🍄‍🟫 First time cooking in my new kit...
item.description:
View on Instagram


BEEF WELLINGTON 🔪🍄‍🟫 First time cooking in my new kitchen!!IngredientsFor the mushroom duxelles-3 tbsp olive oil-4 cups of assorted mushrooms (some great options: cremini, porcini, portobello, chanterelles, button) -½ tsp salt-Freshly ground black pepper -2 to 3 tablespoons fresh thyme For the savory chive crêpes-2 eggs-1 cup flour-¼ tsp salt-1 cup whole milk-2 tablespoons chives (adjust to preference)-Butter (to grease pan) or non-stick cooking spray For the rest of the Wellington fixings: -Center-cut beef tenderloin -Salt and black pepper-1 tbsp avocado oil (or other high smoke-point oil)-3 tbsp Dijon mustard-6 slices prosciutto -1 to 2 sheets of puff pastry (thawed if frozen) Optional: The second puff pastry sheet can be used for decorative purposes, though not necessary!-3 egg yolks#cooking #beefwellington #recipe #holiday

item.title: SMOKEY ONIONY CRUNCHY Mac and Cheese 🧀🧅Ingredients -Mozzar...
item.description:
View on Instagram


SMOKEY ONIONY CRUNCHY Mac and Cheese 🧀🧅Ingredients -Mozzarella-Gruyère -Sharp Cheddar -Colby Jack-Heavy cream or evaporated milk-whole milk-salt-pepper-garlic powder -onion powder-smoked paprika -Campanelle, Cavatappi, Elbow pasta ( or whatever you like ) For the breadcrumbs -sourdough bread-extra virgin olive oil-salt -pepper-garlic powder For the onions -3 tbs butter -thinly sliced onion-pinch of salt -pinch of sugar -Chives or parsley (optional garnish) #cooking #macandcheese #thanksgiving #recipeideas #comfortfood

item.title: Tortelli Di Zucca — one of my favorite ways to eat winter squa...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Tortelli Di Zucca — one of my favorite ways to eat winter squash 😊 IngredientsFOR FILLING-500g of butternut squash-40g of apple mostarda -About 6-8 amaretti cookies, crumbled -50g of Grana Padano, grated-fresh nutmeg-sea salt-freshly cracked black pepperFOR THE PASTA DOUGH-280g 00’ flour-4 whole eggs, 2 egg yolks-Extra virgin olive oil-SaltFINISHING-Butter -SageEnjoy! *note — my stove / oven do not work, so I would’ve roasted the pumpkin if I could have, but either works! #cooking #pasta #thanksgiving #squash

item.title: Switched bodies and made a sandwich. 🦃 #thanksgiving #turkeyd...

View on Instagram


Switched bodies and made a sandwich. 🦃 #thanksgiving #turkeyday #turkey #sandwiches #sandwich #recipes #easyrecipes #leftovers #cookingtime #cooking #cookingathome #sandwichlover #dinnerideas

item.title: Treating myself and pretending I’m at a fancy restaurant is ni...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Treating myself and pretending I’m at a fancy restaurant is nice sometimes☺️ I could not be more excited about having these @madein stainless steel pans—I’ve dreamt of this day. If you’ve been looking to upgrade your cookware, now is a great time. Use my link in bio and get great savings on my favorites from @madein #madeinpartner

item.title: BUTTER CHICKEN 🇮🇳 🤤Ingredients For the chicken / marina...
item.description:
View on Instagram


BUTTER CHICKEN 🇮🇳 🤤Ingredients For the chicken / marinade-1 tbs fresh ginger (minced or paste)-1 tbs fresh garlic (minced or paste)-500 g chicken thigh, sliced-1/2 c full fat yogurt -1 tsp turmeric powder-1 tsp Kashmiri chili powder -1 tsp cumin-1tsp coriander-1.5 tsp garam masala-1 or 2 tbs lemon juice-2 tsp saltFor the butter chicken sauce: -1 tbs neutral oil -2 tbs ghee-1 Cinnamon stick-1 star anise-1 tbs cumin seeds-1 small red onion, finely diced-5 medium fresh tomatoes, quartered (can also use canned tomatoes)-1 tbs ginger and garlic (paste or minced)-1.5 tsp kashmiri chili powder-1 tsp cumin-1tsp coriander-1/3 cup heavy cream-Salt to taste-1 or 2 tbs of fenugreek leaves-Fresh cilantro, chopped (optional garnish)For the Paratha: -500 g atta flour (whole wheat), or AP flour-10 g salt-30 g oil or ghee-300 g room temperature water -more flour for kneading/rollingFor the Jeera Rice-1 cup basmati rice -2 tbs ghee-2 tsp cumin seeds-1 or 2 bay leaves-1 star anise-1 cinnamon stick -2 or 3 cardamom pods -1 small green chili, finely diced-pinch of salt -2 cup waterEnjoy! Wear an apron! #cooking #butterchicken #indianfood #recipe #dinner

item.title: Profiteroles 🍫😋 I got to learn some new baking skills from...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Profiteroles 🍫😋 I got to learn some new baking skills from the legendary Chef @dominiqueansel in NY! Truly a dream come true thank you for having me. You can find this recipe in his new cookbook, “Life’s Sweetest Moments”
